boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP release a duplicate-looking milestone invoice?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match; sources show identical M-4/R4 already paid.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: MS-VAN-076 lists M-4/R4 paid by PRIOR-VAN-076; INV-VAN-076 lacks distinguishing fields.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No distinction on milestone ID, release, or status per STD-VAN-076-P.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Current source boundary open; no credit/reversal evidence.

final_answer: Sources map the action boundary to an open defect: INV-VAN-076 bills the same M-4/R4 already paid per PRIOR-VAN-076 and MS-VAN-076. Policy STD-VAN-076-P requires explicit distinction on ID, release, and status. No such evidence exists. Action may not proceed. Escalate for resolution of the duplicate invoice boundary.
